name: Olist Data Pipeline (GCP + Bruin + Streamlit)
postCreateCommand: sudo rm -f /etc/apt/sources.list.d/yarn.list && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y curl gnupg lsb-release apt-transport-https ca-certificates && wget -O- https://apt.releases.hashicorp.com/gpg | sudo gpg --dearmor -o /usr/share/keyrings/hashicorp-archive-keyring.gpg && echo "deb [signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/hashicorp-archive-keyring.gpg] https://apt.releases.hashicorp.com $(lsb_release -cs) main" | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/hashicorp.list && curl -fsSL https://packages.cloud.google.com/apt/doc/apt-key.gpg | sudo gpg --dearmor -o /usr/share/keyrings/cloud.google.gpg && echo "deb [signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/cloud.google.gpg] https://packages.cloud.google.com/apt cloud-sdk main" | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/google-cloud-sdk.list && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y terraform google-cloud-cli && curl -LsSf https://getbruin.com/install/cli | sh && echo 'export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"' >> ~/.bashrc && pip install --upgrade pip streamlit pandas numpy plotly google-cloud-storage db-dtypes python-dotenv
